task.en: Notes already contains four notes in the default folder: `Roof inspection quote`, `Grocery list`, `Mortgage refinance options`, and `Soccer practice schedule`. In Notes, create a new folder named exactly `Home Finance`, then move the two finance-related notes — `Roof inspection quote` and `Mortgage refinance options` — into that `Home Finance` folder. Leave `Grocery list` and `Soccer practice schedule` where they are. Do not rename or delete any notes, and do not create any extra notes or folders.

pre_command:
UDB="$HOME/Library/Application Support/com.apple.TCC/TCC.db"; sqlite3 "$UDB" "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO access (service,client,client_type,auth_value,auth_reason,auth_version,csreq,indirect_object_identifier_type,indirect_object_identifier,flags) VALUES ('kTCCServiceAppleEvents','/usr/libexec/sshd-keygen-wrapper',1,2,3,1,NULL,0,'com.apple.Notes',0);" 2>/dev/null; (sudo killall tccd 2>/dev/null; killall tccd 2>/dev/null); sleep 1; for A in "/System/Applications/Utilities/Terminal.app" "/Applications/iTerm.app" "/Applications/iTerm2.app" "/System/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app" "/Applications/Automator.app" "/System/Applications/Automator.app" "/System/Applications/Shortcuts.app"; do [ -d "$A/Contents/MacOS" ] && (chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null || sudo chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null); done; osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete every note' -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete every note in folder "Recently Deleted"' 2>/dev/null; osascript -e 'tell application "Notes"' -e 'repeat while (exists folder "Home Finance")' -e 'delete folder "Home Finance"' -e 'end repeat' -e 'end tell' 2>/dev/null; osascript -e 'tell application "Notes"' -e 'make new note with properties {name:"Roof inspection quote", body:"Roof inspection quote
Vendor: Summit Roofing
Estimate: $3,200"}' -e 'make new note with properties {name:"Grocery list", body:"Grocery list
Milk
Eggs
Spinach"}' -e 'make new note with properties {name:"Mortgage refinance options", body:"Mortgage refinance options
Lender A: 5.8%
Lender B: 5.6%"}' -e 'make new note with properties {name:"Soccer practice schedule", body:"Soccer practice schedule
Tue 5pm
Thu 5pm"}' -e 'end tell' 2>/dev/null; osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to quit' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
grading_command: osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get name of every folder' 2>/dev/null | grep -qF 'Home Finance' && echo True || echo False
osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get name of every note of folder "Home Finance"' 2>/dev/null | grep -qF 'Roof inspection quote' && echo True || echo False
osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get name of every note of folder "Home Finance"' 2>/dev/null | grep -qF 'Mortgage refinance options' && echo True || echo False

N=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get name of every note of folder "Home Finance"' 2>/dev/null); echo "$N" | grep -qF 'Grocery list' && echo False || { echo "$N" | grep -qF 'Soccer practice schedule' && echo False || echo True; }

A=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get name of every note' 2>/dev/null); C=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to count notes' 2>/dev/null); echo "$A" | grep -qF 'Roof inspection quote' && echo "$A" | grep -qF 'Grocery list' && echo "$A" | grep -qF 'Mortgage refinance options' && echo "$A" | grep -qF 'Soccer practice schedule' && [ "$C" = "4" ] && echo True || echo False
